ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the size chart */,
  "brand_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the brands table */,
  "clothing_type_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the clothing_types table */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement */,
  "preferred_fit" TEXT /* Preferred fit (e.g., loose, regular, tight) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the purchase */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the customer_measurements table */,
  "size_chart_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the size_charts table */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "purchase_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the purchases table */,
  "fit_rating" TEXT /* Fit rating (1-5, where 1 is poor and 5 is excellent) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the inventory item */,
  "size_chart_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the size_charts table */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of items in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)
